description_long: This is a rustic log cabin with a prominent, dark gabled roof and thick, interlocking timber logs forming the walls. The structure features a wide, overhanging roof with visible wooden beams and log ends, giving it a traditional handcrafted appearance. The front facade includes a small covered porch area supported by sturdy log columns, and the entryway is slightly recessed. Windows are minimal and small, blending into the log construction, and the overall shape is rectangular with a cross-gabled roof. The cabin sits on a low stone or concrete foundation, elevating it slightly above ground level. The exterior is dominated by natural wood tones and dark roofing, evoking a cozy, forested retreat.
description: A traditional log cabin with a dark gabled roof, thick timber walls, and a small covered porch. The design is rustic and handcrafted, with minimal windows and prominent wooden beams.
description_view_0: The front and side of the cabin are visible, showing the covered porch, main entrance, and the intersecting gabled roof.
description_view_1: A direct view of the front gable, highlighting the porch roof, entryway, and the symmetry of the roof structure.
description_view_2: The rear and opposite side of the cabin are visible, with the log construction and roof overhangs clearly shown.
description_view_3: A direct view of the rear gable, emphasizing the log ends and the cross-gabled roof structure.
attribute_roof_type: cross-gabled roof with deep overhangs and dark shingle cladding
attribute_window_arrangement: Minimal, small rectangular windows spaced irregularly on the visible facades, blending with the log construction and not symmetrically arranged
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered under the front porch on the main facade
